title: Policy
description: A serializable policy definition. Describes a policy that can be persisted, distributed, or loaded from configuration. The RolePolicy implementation in basis_core.policy.rules corresponds to a 'role_policy' type entry.

policy_id.description: Stable identifier for this policy definition. Treat as an external identifier — do not rename after the policy is deployed.

policy_type.description: The kind of policy this definition describes. Determines the expected structure of the rules array.

version.description: Version identifier. Appears in DecisionResponse.policy_version and AuditEvent.policy_version for correlation. Non-empty.

description.description: Human-readable description of this policy's purpose and the operational context it governs. Informational only.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this policy version was created or last modified. Must include timezone offset.

created_by.description: Identifier of the principal that created or last modified this policy. Used for policy change audit records.

rules.description: Ordered list of policy rules. Structure depends on policy_type. For role_policy: each rule maps an action to a set of permitted roles. For attribute_policy and time_window_policy: rules include additional conditions.

action.description: Action name this rule governs. Must follow the '{verb}:{domain}[:{object}]' naming convention.

permitted_roles.description: For role_policy: role names that are permitted to perform this action. Non-empty items only.

conditions.description: For attribute_policy or time_window_policy: additional conditions as key/value pairs. Structure is policy-type-specific.
